arts.ttl: Ander Herrera explains key Manchester United weakness which can help Athletic Club Bilbao go through
arts.sum: Manchester United will host Athletic Club Bilbao in the second leg of their Europa League semi-final on Thursday. The Red Devils have a 3-0 advantage from the first match. The La Liga side are without some of their key players such as Nico Williams, Iñaki Williams, Oihan Sancet and Dani Vivian for the trip to The post Ander Herrera explains key Manchester United weakness which can help Athletic Club Bilbao go through appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane mocks Harry Maguire and issues three-word Bruno Fernandes put-down ahead of Man United's clash against Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Roy Keane has poked fun at Harry Maguire after his impact in Man United's win over Athletic Bilbao in the first leg of their Europa League semi-final.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Bilbao Europa League semi final squads with 11 at risk of missing out
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Athletic Bilbao to Old Trafford in the second leg of their Europa League semi-final tie with the Red Devils 3-0 up from the first leg

arts.ttl: 10 players who will miss Man Utd vs Athletic Bilbao as Red Devils deal with fresh blow
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has confirmed that defender Matthijs de Ligt will not feature for Manchester United against Athletic Bilbao in the second leg of their Europa League semi-final at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand Confirms He Will Miss PSG vs Arsenal and Man Utd vs Athletic Club
arts.sum: The former centre-back will not be providing coverage for the Champions League or Europa League games this week after he was admitted into hospital

arts.ttl: Manchester United stars handed Athletic Bilbao warning despite 3-0 semi-final lead
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome Athletic Bilbao to Old Trafford on Thursday in their Europa League semi-final second leg, holding onto a 3-0 first leg lead, but Ruben Amorim doesn't want his players to get complacent

arts.ttl: Man United vs. Athletic Bilbao: Ruben Amorim delivers verdict on devastating team news for La Liga outfit
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim reacts to the absence of three Athletic Bilbao attackers for Thursday's Europa League semi-final second leg.

arts.ttl: Man Utd boosted by huge double injury blow for Athletic Club
arts.sum: Manchester United's chances of reaching the Europa League final receive an almighty boost from opponents Athletic Club.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Manchester United handed huge double BOOST ahead of Europa League semi-final second leg
arts.sum: Manchester United hold a healthy lead over Athletic Bilbao going into the second leg of their Europa League semi-final at Old Trafford and the Spanish side now have an new problem
